canonical_question: How do I design a scalable notification system (push, in-app, email)?

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: FCM HTTP v1 API replaced legacy API (June 2024)

constraints: Always check user notification preferences and opt-out status before sending any notification
Use separate message queues per channel (email, push, SMS, in-app) to prevent one channel failure from blocking others
Never send push notifications without valid device tokens; stale tokens must be pruned on 410/InvalidRegistration responses
FCM legacy HTTP and XMPP APIs were removed June 2024; use HTTP v1 API only
Email notifications must comply with CAN-SPAM (US), CASL (Canada), and GDPR (EU) opt-in/opt-out requirements

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Need to design a chat/messaging system with bidirectional real-time communication
Need to build an event-driven microservices architecture (not notification-specific)

inputs_needed.question: What is your expected notification volume?
Which notification channels do you need?
What is the acceptable delivery latency for critical notifications?

depends_on.label: Message Queue Architecture (Kafka vs RabbitMQ vs SQS)
